_about: Mock LLM responses to dry-run the eval runner. Each response is what we'd HOPE Opus 4.7 returns for the corresponding eval case. If the eval runner passes all 20 against these mocks, the scoring logic is sound and we can move to a live run.
eval_typed_classify::boolean_regression_: {"type": "or", "children": [{"claim": "Member has confirmed cervical radiculopathy.", "source_span": ""}, {"claim": "Member has confirmed cervical myelopathy.", "source_span": ""}], "surface_label": "diagnosis disjunction", "provenance": "transcribed", "source_span": ""}
